name: gemini.models.generate_content
description: Gemini (Google `google-genai` / `@google/genai`) plain turn. Output shape captured from a real `generateContent` call against `gemini-flash-latest` on 2026-05-19, including the newer fields (`thoughtsTokenCount`, `thoughtSignature`, `responseId`, `serviceTier`, `promptTokensDetails`) that Google added after v0.7.0 shipped. Snake_case here pins the Python shape; the renderer + tokensFromUsage accept both casings.

parts.text: What's the capital of Japan? One word.
